In the News

Press

Coverage of City Ghost's single "Good News" — Cause and Effect EP, 2023

Single Premiere July 18, 2023
Jammerzine
"Reminiscent of all those things you loved about 90s guitar rock with an ultra modern feel, City Ghost present the perfect gateway drug for Cause and Effect."
Read Article ↗
Feature July 18, 2023
Earmilk
"City Ghost pens a relatable anthem all about mental health struggles and trying to find healing in the midst of episodes of anxiety and depression."
Read Article ↗
Review July 21, 2023
CelebMix
"A must listen and a strong debut off of their upcoming EP. City Ghost has been making waves with their engaging live performances and dynamic alt rock releases."
Read Article ↗
Review July 22, 2023
Last Day Deaf
"City Ghost's excellent indie rock spirit echoes the nostalgia of 90s icons like Veruca Salt & Belly, leaving us mesmerized by their emotive storytelling."
Read Article ↗
Interview August 3, 2023
Showstopper
"Good News is cathartic and melancholy. It has a pop drive with a nostalgic 90s feel — a song you can jam out to through the highs and lows."
Read Article ↗
Review August 1, 2023
1st Day Fresh
"The song is a dynamic mix of rock and pop with moody guitars, impassioned vocals and an arena-worthy chorus. City Ghost uses their platform to inspire others to be authentic and open about their internal struggles."
Read Article ↗
